tpa.sent: &aDa gui yeu cau dich chuyen den &e{player}&a. Dang cho phan hoi...
tpa.accepted_delay: &aDa chap nhan! Se dich chuyen sau &e{seconds} &agiay...
tpa.denied: &aBan da tu choi yeu cau cua &e{player}&a.
tpa.no_request: &cKhong co yeu cau nao dang cho tu nguoi choi do.
tpa.already_sent: &cBan da co yeu cau dang cho den nguoi choi do!
tpa.self: &cKhong the gui yeu cau cho chinh minh!
tpahere.sent: &aDa gui yeu cau dich chuyen den day cho &e{player}&a.
tpahere.already_sent: &cDa co yeu cau dang cho den nguoi choi do!
tpahere.self: &cKhong the gui yeu cau cho chinh minh!
back.success: &aDa dich chuyen den vi tri chet.
tpall.success: &aTat ca nguoi choi (&e{count}&a) da dich chuyen den ban.
tpall.notify: &eDuoc dich chuyen boi quan tri vien &a{player}&e.
